data.title: Man Questioned In UnitedHealthcare CEO Murder: McDonald's Customer Tip Leads To Detainment In Pennsylvania
data.description: A person has been detained in Pennsylvania that could be a suspect in the murder of UnitedHealthcare CEO Brian Thompson.

data.title: Only 3% Of Cannabis Consumed In Canada Came From Illicit Sources, National Survey Shows
data.description: Discover key insights from the Canadian Cannabis Survey 2024: legal access soars, smoking declines, and youth usage remains stable. Learn more about evolving cannabis trends in Canada.

data.title: Ethereum's 'Important Week:' $4,000 Tapped But Why Is ETH Going Down?
data.description: Ethereum's (CRYPTO: ETH) to $4,000 has come to a sudden end on Monday, but traders on social media continue to see bullish catalysts driving ETH higher in the future.
